authority.activation_requires: Explicit owner acceptance and retention commit of the complete APP-A1 package, followed by exact committed-byte and environment preflight.

registered_intervention_targets.derivation: Exact scientific initial coherence plus the frozen G/E/P signed packet vectors; these values are frozen before APP-A2 and may not be learned from an earlier arm.

implementation_contract.operation_transport: public schedule_packet_departure plus native departure/arrival processing
implementation_contract.response_transport: public set_causal_flux_routes plus native produce_events using packet_departure_from_flux_route
implementation_contract.response_amount_authority: native source_coherence multiplied by frozen amount_fraction=0.82; executor may not schedule or inject calculated R amounts
implementation_contract.state_interventions: copied LGRC9V3 runtime state plus public set_state after public packet-ledger rebase; before/after identities and imposed-total receipt required
implementation_contract.semantic_observer: read-only experiment-owned role, receipt, gate, and conclusion projection
implementation_contract.runner_and_reconstructor_requirement: APP-A2 implementation bytes and normalized commands must be statically validated and hash-bound before activation; implementation may only realize this freeze and may not select or change values, arms, gates, controls, or conclusions.

entry_isolation.child_input: Only the exact freeze identity and one frozen arm row supplied by the parent; no previous result path or payload.
entry_isolation.child_output: Canonical JSON over captured stdout returned to the parent; no per-arm persistent file.
entry_isolation.incomplete_earlier_arm_effect: None on later authorization; aggregate completion still fails closed.

per_arm: each selected or diverted G/E/P public-call receipt
operation opportunity, cost proxy, timing, packet, event, and route receipt
predecessor output carrier identity equals successor input carrier identity
intervention before/after identities and ledger-rebase receipt when applicable
native R producer and carrier-only source receipts
per-axis R packet mass and post-R state
save/load, deterministic continuation, and reset identities
aggregate: all 19 unique arm receipts in frozen order
zero missing, failed, invalid, or nonevaluable required arms
one-source, role-rotation, label, and two-order-control resolutions
bounded terminal classification and blocked claims

evaluation_contract.configuration_condition: Every arm must retain amount_fraction=0.82 exactly; mismatch is nonevaluable.
evaluation_contract.environment_feedback: arm environment-axis R packet mass minus matched-reference environment-axis R packet mass >= 0.04
evaluation_contract.support_feedback: arm support-axis R packet mass minus matched-reference support-axis R packet mass >= 0.02
evaluation_contract.phase_residual: maximum across four axes of abs((arm pre-R carrier minus reference pre-R carrier) minus (arm R packet mass minus reference R packet mass)) <= 0.015
evaluation_contract.registered_route_merge_leakage: (unregistered shared-carrier packet mass plus absolute native budget error) / max(1, total registered common-carrier packet mass) <= 1e-12
evaluation_contract.primary_relation: GEP passes all four measured gates and every valid proper subset reference/G/E/P/GE/GP/EP fails at least one measured gate.
evaluation_contract.causal_relation: Each operation withdrawal changes R directly or the corresponding mediator-restore intervention changes R; carrier clamp changes R.
evaluation_contract.scientific_zero: Complete invocation, opportunity, timing, path, and receipts can be operationally valid with exactly zero measured carrier effect.
evaluation_contract.nonevaluable_rule: Any missing/failed/invalid arm, configuration mismatch, contaminated response window, incomplete receipt chain, or unresolved registered comparison fails the complete matrix closed and supplies no subset-insufficiency result.

interpretation_contract.positive_functional_description: bounded functional complementarity of operations through the common carrier relative only to the frozen fixture and gate signature
interpretation_contract.one_source_reproduces: physical participant plurality is non-load-bearing in the frozen fixture
interpretation_contract.one_source_does_not_reproduce: participant plurality remains unresolved unless the matched cyclic rotation independently reproduces the relation and operation-to-R paths
interpretation_contract.both_order_inversions_lose: the bounded G->E->P ordered sequence is load-bearing
interpretation_contract.only_one_order_inversion_loses: at least one source-grounded handoff is order-sensitive
interpretation_contract.neither_order_inversion_loses: the two tested adjacent inversions do not make order load-bearing

evidence_effect_now: Inactive exact APP-A2 execution contract only. It supplies no Appendix result and no authority to execute.
